scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,green "cross-env VITE_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:5001 npm run dev:client" "cross-env PORT=5001 npm run dev:server"
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run build:server
scripts.check:all: npm run health:backend && npm run health:jobs
scripts.health:backend: node -e "fetch('http://localhost:5000/health').then(async (r) => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); console.log(await r.text()); }).catch((e) => { console.error('Backend health check failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.health:jobs: node -e "fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/jobs').then((r) => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); console.log('Jobs API OK'); }).catch((e) => { console.error('Jobs API check failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
